summary: Phase 7 Part 1: Client Portal Messaging System - ALL TESTS PASSED. Both backend API tests (11/11) and frontend UI tests completed successfully. Bidirectional messaging between creative (studio owner) and client via portal is fully functional.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/leads/:leadId/messages - returns messages for a lead (auth required) ✓
5. PATCH /api/leads/:leadId/messages/read - marks client messages as read ✓
6. GET /api/leads/unread-counts/all - returns unread counts per lead ✓
7. GET /api/portal/:token/messages - public, returns messages for portal ✓
12. Login and navigate to lead detail modal ✓
13. Messages tab visible with badge showing unread count ✓
14. Messages thread shows existing messages (7+ messages) ✓
15. Creative can type and send message via data-testid='creative-message-input' ✓
16. Creative send button works via data-testid='creative-send-message-btn' ✓
22. iMessage-style bubbles with proper alignment (client=right, creative=left) ✓
24. Dark theme in LeadDetailModal (matching app theme) ✓
critical_code_review_comments: All messaging endpoints working correctly with proper authentication
Public portal endpoints work without auth as expected
Unread counts properly track client messages
UI properly displays bidirectional conversation with iMessage-style design
data-testid attributes correctly implemented for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Test messages created during testing via API and UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7 Part 1 Client Portal Messaging System is fully functional. Messages API supports authenticated endpoints for creatives (/api/leads/:id/messages) and public endpoints for clients (/api/portal/:token/messages). Emmanuel lead (ID: 2002320d-9d1b-4f27-b126-758d8930340e) has active message thread. LeadDetailModal has Messages tab with unread badge. ClientPortalMessages component uses light theme with iMessage-style bubbles.

verification_summary.portal_messages_api: PASS - Public endpoints work without auth
verification_summary.creative_ui_messages: PASS - Messages tab in LeadDetailModal functional
verification_summary.bidirectional_flow: PASS - Messages flow both directions correctly
verification_summary.mark_as_read: PASS - Marks client messages as read
